svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(179, 179, 179)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(179, 179, 179));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(179, 179, 179)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(179, 179, 179));

fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240));

fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(57, 177, 3)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(57, 177, 3));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(57, 177, 3)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(57, 177, 3));

fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 0, 0), rgb(0, 128, 240));
